channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Trump touts Iran breakthrough but details remain unclear - NPR
item.description:
1. Trump touts Iran breakthrough but details remain unclear  NPR
  2. Details of US-Iran deal begin to emerge after Trump announces progress  AP News
  3. What is included in the Iran ceasefire deal?  The Guardian
  4. Iranian Officials Say Proposed Peace Deal Would End Fighting and Open Strait  The New York Times
  5. U.S. prepares for new military strikes against Iran  CBS News

item.description:
1. Ukraine Says It’s Under Attack From Major Russian Air Strikes  Bloomberg.com

item.description:

item.title: A suicide bombing near a railway track in southwest Pakistan kills at least 23 people - AP News
item.description:
1. A suicide bombing near a railway track in southwest Pakistan kills at least 23 people  AP News

  4. Pakistan: Blast targeting train kills at least 24 in Balochistan  BBC

item.title: US-Iran deal said to open strait for 60 days, Iran to discuss giving up enriched uranium - The Times of Israel
item.description:

item.title: Deadliest coal mine explosion in China in years kills at least 82 people - NPR
item.description:
1. Deadliest coal mine explosion in China in years kills at least 82 people  NPR

  4. China lowers death toll in Shanxi coal mine disaster to 82  Reuters

item.title: Iran, US Signal Progress in Peace Talks as Issues Unresolved - Bloomberg.com
item.description:
1. Iran, US Signal Progress in Peace Talks as Issues Unresolved  Bloomberg.com

item.title: Watch China launch Shenzhou 23 astronauts to its Tiangong space station on May 24 - Space
item.description:

  4. Hong Kong’s first astronaut Lai Ka-ying picked for space station mission  South China Morning Post

item.title: Israeli Strikes Pummel Lebanon, Killing Medics Amid Fragile Truce - The New York Times
item.description:
1. Israeli Strikes Pummel Lebanon, Killing Medics Amid Fragile Truce  The New York Times

item.title: Tens of thousands rally in Serbia for antigovernment demonstrations - Al Jazeera
item.description:

item.title: 9-story building under construction in the Philippines collapses, leaving 21 people missing - AP News
item.description: 9-story building under construction in the Philippines collapses, leaving 21 people missing  AP NewsSee more headlines & perspectives on Google News

item.title: Despite ‘chaotic communication,’ Polish aide says Trump is committed to troops in Europe - politico.eu
item.description:
1. Despite ‘chaotic communication,’ Polish aide says Trump is committed to troops in Europe  politico.eu

  4. NATO allies grapple with U.S. pullback, confusion over its military plans  The Washington Post
  5. Trump Commits Troops to Poland After Asking Hegseth About Canceled Deployment  WSJ

item.title: Bodies of divers who died in Maldives scuba accident returned to Italy - CBS News
item.description:
1. Bodies of divers who died in Maldives scuba accident returned to Italy  CBS News
  2. Maldives cave divers died after ‘taking wrong turn’  Yahoo
  3. After 6 Dead in a Maldives Scuba Tragedy, the Safety Lessons We Need to Take Away  Outside Magazine
  4. Shock Reason Behind Deaths of 5 Tourists in Ill-Fated Dive Emerges  The Daily Beast
  5. ‘If something goes wrong, you can’t simply surface’: Maldives tragedy shines light on dangers of cave diving  The Guardian

item.title: What will Trump do next with Iran? - NPR
item.description:
1. What will Trump do next with Iran?  NPR
  2. Trump’s Endgame Is Surrender  The Atlantic
  3. An ever-expanding catastrophe over Iran is not inevitable. Trump can and must be stopped | Simon Tisdall  The Guardian
  4. Opinion | Trump and Fox News are trapped in a doom loop on Iran  MS NOW
  5. US or Iran: Who will win the Hormuz endurance game?  dw.com
